resources.string: Fires after a program block ends so you log it while it\'s fresh.
Random boosts tied to your goals — Bewsoa AI, YKS, SAT, that university abroad.
Sunday evening: the AI coach drafts next week\'s program from your results.
Silent live countdown while a Deep Focus session runs.
The block running right now, minutes left, and a one-tap Done.
Today\'s progress bar, done count, and what\'s next.
Your streak and the never-miss-twice status.
